# Copilot Instructions (Demo)

> **Note:** This is a demo setup for demonstration purposes only.

The instruction files in this folder configure GitHub Copilot agent behavior for collaborative development.

## Source Material

These files are based on:
- [AIAcademy-VibeCoding](https://github.com/m365-core/AIAcademy-VibeCoding) - M365 Core AI Academy patterns
- [AI Tip of the Week #20: Co-developing with AI agent mode](https://dev.azure.com/mseng/1ES/_wiki/wikis/1ES.wiki/50977/AI-Tip-of-the-Week-20-Co-developing-with-AI-agent-mode) - 1ES guidance on agent collaboration
